top20Issues.title: Org deletion had no member/mission gate
Payment failure with no retry logic
Razorpay needs public BASE_URL
top20Issues.note: Deploy to VPS before inviting users

top20Issues.title: OAuth credentials founder-configured
top20Issues.note: Via /integrations UI — not a code issue

top20Issues.title: No troubleshooting video guides
top20Issues.note: Text guides exist; videos optional for v1

top20Issues.title: AI provider usage not per-session
top20Issues.note: usageMetering.cjs covers aggregate; per-session enhancement is v2

top20Issues.title: Quota not enforced at route level
top20Issues.note: checkOrgLimit() available — wire into org create route in next sprint

top10Risks.risk: Email not configured before beta launch
top10Risks.mitigation: Test email before first invite. Use VPS with RESEND_API_KEY.

top10Risks.risk: Razorpay webhook fails on localhost (no BASE_URL)
Single-node PM2 goes down under 50 concurrent beta users
top10Risks.mitigation: Monitor /ops. Use PM2 cluster mode if DAU > 30/day concurrent.

top10Risks.risk: Flat-file JSON concurrency on writes from 25+ users
top10Risks.mitigation: Beta scale (25-50 users, low concurrency) is acceptable. Plan SQLite for v2.

top10Risks.risk: Beta user shares invite codes publicly
top10Risks.mitigation: Invite codes expire after 1 use. Revocation now available. Monitor /beta/invites.

top10Risks.risk: AI provider quota exhausted (Groq free tier)
top10Risks.mitigation: Monitor usageMetering. Set GROQ_API_KEY from paid plan before beta.

top10Risks.risk: Password reset email lost in spam
top10Risks.mitigation: Configure SPF/DKIM on sending domain. Use branded sender.

top10Risks.risk: Razorpay subscription plan IDs not configured
top10Risks.mitigation: Set RAZORPAY_PLAN_ID_STARTER before upgrade flow goes live.

top10Risks.risk: Founder unavailable for support during beta
top10Risks.mitigation: KB articles + FAQ + auto-CS tickets. EOD summary surfaces issues.

top10Risks.risk: Beta users attempt enterprise features on trial plan
top10Risks.mitigation: featureGate.cjs blocks gracefully. Upgrade prompt shown.

top10PainPoints.painPoint: Users don't know they need an invite code
top10PainPoints.resolution: Landing page text + error message clarified in checkBetaGate()
SPF/DKIM setup guide in KB. Telegram fallback for notification.

top10PainPoints.painPoint: OAuth flow unclear (which scopes, redirect URL setup)
top10PainPoints.resolution: Integration wizard in /integrations UI covers this
requireActiveAccount() returns upgrade URL. 402 response with message.

top10PainPoints.painPoint: Users confused by workspace vs org hierarchy
top10PainPoints.resolution: Onboarding wizard (onboardingEngine) walks through the hierarchy

top10PainPoints.painPoint: AI chat returns errors when GROQ_API_KEY not set
top10PainPoints.resolution: /health warns 'N services not configured'. /ops shows specific status.

top10PainPoints.painPoint: Password reset link expires after 1 hour
top10PainPoints.resolution: 1h TTL is intentional security. KB article added to FAQ.

top10PainPoints.painPoint: No in-app feedback button on every screen
Mobile app (Capacitor) not yet linked to beta flow
top10PainPoints.resolution: PASS BY DESIGN — mobile is separate; web beta first

top10PainPoints.painPoint: Users want email notifications, not just Telegram
top10PainPoints.resolution: emailService.cjs supports arbitrary sends. Notification service is v2.

launchBlockers: Area C: Email delivery requires env config
Area C: Razorpay needs public BASE_URL
goNoGoRationale: Confidence 71/100. 2 open item(s) require founder env configuration before beta launch.
remainingManualSteps: Configure BASE_URL, RESEND_API_KEY, RAZORPAY_KEY_ID in VPS .env
Set RAZORPAY_PLAN_ID_STARTER and RAZORPAY_PLAN_ID_GROWTH for subscription upgrades
Test welcome email + password reset delivery end-to-end
Verify Razorpay webhook with a test payment on VPS
Publish ≥10 KB articles for beta users
